metadata.description:
JSFX plugins for Reaper by Steve Cox.
Current plugins: - PsychoBass: Psychoacoustic bass enhancement
See https://github.com/stevewcox/SteveCoxJSFX for full documentation.

Psychoacoustic bass enhancement using timbre-matched harmonic generation.
Adds upper harmonics to bass signals so they remain audible on small speakers and earbuds, without the synthetic character of naive harmonic generators.
Based on published Virtual Bass System research (Ben-Tzur/Colloms AES 1999, Larsen & Aarts JAES 2002, Mu/Gan/Tan ICASSP 2013).
Controls: Frequency - Crossover point (40-200 Hz). Set just above your lowest note. Intensity - Harmonic generation amount (0-100%) Original Bass - Level of sub-bass in output (0-100%) Harmonics Mix - Blend of generated harmonics (0-100%) Output Gain - Output trim (-24 to +10 dB) Harmonic Tilt - Roll-off of upper harmonics (0-8 dB/oct) Harmonic Style - Full (smooth decay ~2kHz, best for bass guitar), Tight (focused low-mids, drops ~600Hz, kick drum), Bright (raw NLD, extends to 10kHz+, use sparingly)
Suggested starting point for bass guitar: Frequency: 85Hz, Intensity: 55%, Original Bass: 75%, Harmonics Mix: 60%, Tilt: 4dB, Style: Full

version.author: stevewcox
version.changelog:
v0.2.6
v0.2.x - Major architecture revision: - NLD pre-gain normalisation for consistent drive at any input level - Compander redesigned: harmonics now scale with envelope rather than being suppressed - Two-shelf spectral envelope replaces single tilt shelf - Harmonic HP reduced to 2nd order to preserve 2nd harmonic energy - Output Gain default changed to 0dB - Tilt range extended to 8 dB/oct
